name: Rain Table Lamp - 18 Inch Height - TBL4523 - Smoke Grey/Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Rain table lamp. This 18 inch masterpiece in smoke grey and brass combines glass and metal for a look that is both modern and timeless. The subtle smoke grey glass offers a soft, diffused glow, while the brass base adds a touch of elegance to any room. Perfect for your living room, bedroom, or office, this lamp serves both as a functional piece and a stylish decor element. Its harmonious design complements various interiors, making it a versatile addition to your home. Experience the fusion of form and function with the Rain table lamp and create an inviting ambiance that suits any occasion.
